title: Rule of Law Open Science (RoLOS)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2av3b","text":"Rule of Law Open Science (RoLOS) establishes a step-by-step protocol for the legal co-organization of scientific methodology projects in compliance with the most respected public international law (PIL) open justice standards.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"5lnt5","text":"Rule of Law Open Science (RoLOS) Protocol is a step-by-step practical guide for the secure operational development (DevSecOps) of scientific experiments.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"dfkdq","text":"Read the whole Rule of Law Open Science (RoLOS) protocol before starting developing with it.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
